programme.title: The Finder
programme.desc: When Walter's older brother Langston comes to town, he lets Walter know their father is dying and has asked that Walter visit him. As his dying wish, his father asks Walter to find his first love, Walter and Langston's mother. Taking on the most important search of his life, Walter battles obstacles which may prove to be insurmountable as his father's health rapidly declines. Meanwhile, Willa is being forced to marry Timo by their Uncle Shadrack.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Grayson investigates whether Lady Jayne is a vampire hunter; Lucy employs absinthe, romance and a tour of London to mend Nina's broken heart; Grayson earns a powerful enemy.

programme.title: Dracula
programme.desc: Grayson tries to win Lady Jayne's heart; Lucy hides her broken heart behind planning Mina and Harker's engagement party.

programme.title: Day Break
programme.desc: Brett makes the decision to take Rita and try to make a run for it by getting out of town, in an attempt to escape the day. But he soon discovers the disastrous consequences his rash actions have on others.

programme.title: Dream Academy
programme.desc: A rare insight into the highs and lows of life as a start-up entrepreneur. This documentary series follows a group of fledgling businesses as they strive to make their first million.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Billy gets a new appreciation for an old classic. Laurel luxuriates in New Farm. Jess learns the art of pasta making, while Alastair discovers a pizzeria with a difference.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: The speed dates begin. Our first three farmers begin their search for a wife. They'll choose five ladies to take home to their farms on the most romantic journey of their lives.

programme.title: Baking It
programme.desc: Maya Rudolph and Amy Poehler welcome new teams of home bakers to the cabin, starting things off with a bang by asking the bakers to recreate a cake that just exploded.

programme.title: Baking It
programme.desc: Maya and Amy challenge the bakers to create edible representations of their worst fears; the Panel of Opinionated Grannies tastes snakes, spiders, eyeballs and more to choose the winning Phobia Bake.

programme.title: Holistic Living
programme.desc: A mind, body and soul series. Hosted by Jess Dempsey and renowned author and Australia's leading holistic expert, Kayla Marie from Soul Journey Healings.

programme.title: Holistic Living
programme.desc: A mind, body and soul series. Hosted by Jess Dempsey and renowned author and Australia's leading holistic expert, Kayla Marie from Soul Journey Healings.

programme.title: The Intolerant Cooks
programme.desc: Join witty food intolerants as they create delicious recipes using fresh regional produce for those with food sensitivities.

programme.title: Extended Family
programme.sub-title: The Consequences of Writing Things Down
programme.desc: When Jim embellishes his yoga abilities to impress a woman, Julia must step in to save him from looking like a fool.

programme.title: Grand Crew
programme.desc: The crew goes to a wine-tasting event at a very exclusive club. Noah and Sherm enter a wine-tasting competition while Anthony and Nicky try to get into the \.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Becky helps Harris keep a secret from Darlene, which opens up a can of worms that causes a rift between the two sisters; Jackie supports Peter with his Nordic history project.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: When Dan gets injured on the job covering D.J.'s vending-machine route, the choice to sue the company could lead to D.J. getting fired.

programme.title: Bondi Vet
programme.sub-title: Poppy, The Dog Without A Nose
programme.desc: Poppy is a Fijian native dog whose nose was cut off in a horrific hunting accident. In the north of Fiji there are no full-time vets, volunteers at Animals Fiji have managed to keep her alive with donations raised in Australia. Now Chris has gone to Fiji to bring the little girl back to Australia for major reconstructive surgery and hopefully a whole new life with an adopted family. Unless something is done, Poppy will always face serious infections and be shunned because of her shocking brutal injuries.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Welcome to the courtroom of Judge Judith Sheindlin. The cases are real, the people are real, and the rulings are final.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to New York to visit PJ's Steakhouse. Owners Joe and Madalyn are in serious debt after opening the high-end restaurant and are struggling to keep the business afloat.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Bazzini restaurant in New Jersey. Owner Paul Bazzini is an award-winning chef who decided to run his own restaurant, but who never realised how difficult the change would be.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to transform a Puerto Rican restaurant struggling to keep the business afloat.

programme.title: First Dates UK
programme.desc: Looking for love this time are self-proclaimed 'man-eater' and a urologist.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: While conducting an autopsy on a petty officer who is believed to have died from natural causes, an armed man enters the morgue and holds Wade, Sebastian and Danny hostage.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: After a Navy commander's car is stolen with his baby inside, the team must determine whether it was a random incident or a targeted abduction.

programme.title: The Rising
programme.desc: Neve discovers that there is another woman like her; together they face their trauma in a bid to remember what happened.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to New York to visit PJ's Steakhouse. Owners Joe and Madalyn are in serious debt after opening the high-end restaurant and are struggling to keep the business afloat.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Bazzini restaurant in New Jersey. Owner Paul Bazzini is an award-winning chef who decided to run his own restaurant, but who never realised how difficult the change would be.

programme.title: First Dates UK
programme.desc: Looking for love this time are self-proclaimed 'man-eater' and a urologist.

programme.title: The Girl in the Woods
programme.desc: Desperate for information on how to close the tear, Carrie returns to the land of nightmares and faces off against the girl she once betrayed; Tasha fights for her life as she's stalked by a relentless monster.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: It's Academic
programme.desc: Simon Reeve hosts the educational and entertaining show, where schools compete to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Get Clever
programme.desc: An outrageous series where adventure, fun and the wonders of science are burst wide open.

programme.title: Flushed
programme.desc: A children's game show that tests, not only mental, but physical skills of the contestants. Two teams gather minutes by answering questions correctly, and then it's a race to fit together a sequence of connective tubing within the time frame racked up from the questions. If a team has more minutes, they've got a better chance of completing the build. The stakes are high, as the losing team face getting slimed by the winners.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: The Great Day Out
programme.desc: Spring is so close you can almost smell it. To celebrate, Jillian uncovers upcoming spring events, Laurel explores the exquisite gardens of the Lockyer Valley, and Loretta Ryan shares her great day out.

programme.title: Farmer Wants a Wife
programme.desc: Farmers Joe and Tom meet their love matches before choosing five ladies to return to their farms. All the farmers each take one special lady on a 24-hour date before being joined by the others.

programme.title: Baking It
programme.desc: Maya and Amy pull vintage recipes from the Grannies' purses and ask the bakers to give their modern take on old-fashioned dishes that are as retro as they are revolting.

programme.title: Baking It
programme.desc: The bakers must decide if sweet or savory is better; Amy and Maya ask them to bake a pie that puts their best taste forward in the semi-finals; one team is eliminated, and the final four continue to the finals.

programme.title: Baking It
programme.desc: In the ultimate challenge, Amy and Maya task bakers to push their limits. Teams craft show-stopping holiday centrepieces to impress the Grannies and seize the cash prize in the explosive season finale.

programme.title: The Intolerant Cooks
programme.desc: Join witty food intolerants as they create delicious recipes using fresh regional produce for those with food sensitivities.

programme.title: Extended Family
programme.desc: When Jim learns of Trey's St. Patrick's Day fundraiser plans, he offers his expertise in an effort to save Trey and the Celtics from embarrassment.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With everyone living back at home, the house is full of Goldberg chaos and also... Goldberg stuff, which is driving pregnant Erica bonkers. She enlists Beverly's help in clearing things out for the baby. Meanwhile, Adam and Barry are forced to share a bedroom to make room for the baby nursery. Adam can't handle how insufferable Barry is, so he comes up with the ultimate prank to get back at him.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: When Ben offers Mark free piano lessons, Darlene finds this as an opportunity to test his parenting skills.

programme.title: Australia's Got Talent
programme.desc: The best of the best return for the semifinals. Judges Shane Jacobson, Lucy Durack, Nicole Scherzinger and Manu Feildel have selected 30 acts to come back and battle for a place in the grand final.

programme.title: Dakota
programme.desc: Kate, a widow who lost her husband in the war in Afghanistan, struggles to maintain her small-town farm with her daughter while also running the local volunteer fire department.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: A struggling musician realises he's the only person on Earth who can remember The Beatles after waking up in an alternate reality where they never existed.

programme.title: Downhill
programme.desc: Barely escaping an avalanche during a ski vacation in the Alps, a married couple is thrown into disarray as they are forced to re-evaluate their lives and their feelings about each other.

programme.title: The Mentor
programme.desc: Australian entrepreneur Mark Bouris travels Australia to answer the call from struggling small business owners. The mentor will help each of the businesses evolve and improve their situation.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Home Shopping
programme.desc: Shopping program.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Following the blackmail trail, Eric and Danny discover John has another family. Everything goes awry at the police station as Patrick makes a shocking confession in a fit of rage, and Eric feels he is no closer to knowing who killed Kate.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: A guilty Patrick nearly unravels before Eric and Amanda can stop him. Meanwhile, Cornell arrives to make an arrest in the case, and back at the station, Cornell and Turk question Eric about his mother and the night of Kate's murder.
